tasks.subject: Task 1: Install dependencies and create lib files
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add TanStack Query packages, create queryClient.ts and persister.ts, add NEXT_PUBLIC_CACHE_VERSION env var.

**Files:**
- Modify: package.json (via npm install)
- Create: src/lib/queryClient.ts
- Create: src/lib/persister.ts
- Modify: .env.local

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] @tanstack/react-query, @tanstack/react-query-persist-client, @tanstack/query-async-storage-persister, idb-keyval installed
- [ ] queryClient.ts exports QueryClient with networkMode: offlineFirst, staleTime: 30_000, gcTime: 86_400_000
- [ ] persister.ts exports persister backed by idb-keyval
- [ ] NEXT_PUBLIC_CACHE_VERSION=1 in .env.local

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/queryClient.ts", "src/lib/persister.ts", ".env.local"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["TanStack Query packages installed", "queryClient.ts exports singleton with offlineFirst config", "persister.ts exports idb-keyval backed persister", "NEXT_PUBLIC_CACHE_VERSION=1 in .env.local"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Providers setup and SW NetworkOnly config
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wrap app in PersistQueryClientProvider and configure SW to bypass /api/* routes.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/app/providers.tsx
- Modify: next.config.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] providers.tsx wraps children in PersistQueryClientProvider with singleton queryClient and persister
- [ ] next.config.ts has NetworkOnly rule for /api/
- [ ] npx tsc --noEmit passes

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/providers.tsx", "next.config.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PersistQueryClientProvider wraps app", "SW excludes /api/ from cache"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: useOnlineStatus hook
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Hook tracking navigator.onLine with online/offline events.

**Files:**
- Create: src/hooks/useOnlineStatus.ts
- Create: src/hooks/useOnlineStatus.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Returns true when online, false when offline
- [ ] Updates reactively on online/offline events
- [ ] 3 tests pass

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/hooks/useOnlineStatus.test.ts` → 3 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/hooks/useOnlineStatus.ts", "src/hooks/useOnlineStatus.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/hooks/useOnlineStatus.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Returns correct online state", "Reacts to online/offline events", "3 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: mutationQueue utility (temp ID remapping)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** remapMutationQueue(tempId, realId) replaces temp IDs in persisted IndexedDB mutation cache.

**Files:**
- Create: src/lib/mutationQueue.ts
- Create: src/lib/mutationQueue.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Replaces all occurrences of tempId with realId in cached JSON
- [ ] No-op when cache is empty or tempId not present
- [ ] 3 tests pass

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/lib/mutationQueue.test.ts` → 3 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/mutationQueue.ts", "src/lib/mutationQueue.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/lib/mutationQueue.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Replaces tempId with realId everywhere", "No-op on empty cache", "3 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Extract taskUtils and create useTaskQueries
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move pure utilities from useTasks.ts to taskUtils.ts; create useTaskQueries backed by useQuery.

**Files:**
- Create: src/hooks/taskUtils.ts
- Create: src/hooks/useTaskQueries.ts
- Create: src/hooks/useTaskQueries.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] taskUtils.ts exports buildTasksUrl, withPriorityScores, filterTasks, TaskFilters, CreateTaskInput
- [ ] useTaskQueries returns { tasks, isLoading, error } from useQuery
- [ ] useTasks.test.ts still passes
- [ ] 2 new tests pass

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/hooks/useTaskQueries.test.ts src/hooks/useTasks.test.ts` → all pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/hooks/taskUtils.ts", "src/hooks/useTaskQueries.ts", "src/hooks/useTaskQueries.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/hooks/useTaskQueries.test.ts src/hooks/useTasks.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["taskUtils.ts exports all utilities", "useTaskQueries returns tasks from useQuery", "existing useTasks tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: useTaskMutations
tasks.description:
**Goal:** All 14 task mutation functions with optimistic updates, rollback, and temp ID handling for createTask.

**Files:**
- Create: src/hooks/useTaskMutations.ts
- Create: src/hooks/useTaskMutations.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All 14 mutation functions with correct signatures
- [ ] createTask generates temp ID, optimistic update, remapMutationQueue on success
- [ ] toggleTask optimistically flips, rolls back on error
- [ ] reorderTasks optimistically reorders, rolls back on error
- [ ] 4 tests pass

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/hooks/useTaskMutations.test.ts` → 4 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/hooks/useTaskMutations.ts", "src/hooks/useTaskMutations.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/hooks/useTaskMutations.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All 14 mutations exist", "createTask temp ID + remap", "optimistic updates + rollback", "4 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Rewrite useTasks wrapper and update pages
tasks.description:
**Goal:** useTasks becomes a thin wrapper; tasks/page.tsx and archive/page.tsx drop manual fetch calls.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/hooks/useTasks.ts
- Modify: src/app/tasks/page.tsx
- Modify: src/app/archive/page.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] useTasks.ts is ≤30 lines, re-exports from taskUtils.ts
- [ ] tasks/page.tsx has no fetchTasks/fetchProjects/fetchTags calls
- [ ] archive/page.tsx has no fetchTasks call
- [ ] useTasks.test.ts still passes

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/hooks/useTasks.test.ts` → all pass; `npx tsc --noEmit` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/hooks/useTasks.ts", "src/app/tasks/page.tsx", "src/app/archive/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/hooks/useTasks.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["useTasks thin wrapper", "no manual fetch calls in pages", "existing tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Refactor useProjects with TanStack Query
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace useProjects internals with useQuery + useMutation; project mutations use networkMode: online.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/hooks/useProjects.ts
- Modify: src/hooks/useProjects.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] fetchProjects is a no-op
- [ ] createProject, deleteProject, updateProject use networkMode: online
- [ ] Projects read from useQuery(['projects'])
- [ ] All tests pass

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/hooks/useProjects.test.ts` → all pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/hooks/useProjects.ts", "src/hooks/useProjects.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/hooks/useProjects.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["useQuery for reads", "networkMode: online on mutations", "tests pass"]}
```

tasks.description:

- Modify: src/hooks/useTags.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] fetchTags is a no-op
- [ ] All tag mutations use networkMode: online
- [ ] Tags read from useQuery(['tags'])

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/hooks/useTags.ts", "src/hooks/useTags.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/hooks/useTags.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["useQuery for reads", "networkMode: online on mutations", "tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Disable project/tag UI when offline

**Files:**

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All project create/edit/delete buttons disabled when offline
- [ ] All tag create/edit/delete buttons disabled when offline
- [ ] title tooltip says 'Недоступно без подключения'
- [ ] npx tsc --noEmit passes

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/tasks/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Project mutation buttons disabled offline", "Tag mutation buttons disabled offline", "Tooltip present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Logout cache clear and session expiry handling
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Clear IndexedDB on logout; global 401 handler shows re-login modal.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/components/BurgerMenu.tsx
- Modify: src/lib/queryClient.ts
- Modify: src/app/providers.tsx
- Create: src/lib/apiFetch.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Sign out calls queryClient.clear() + persister.removeClient() before signOut()
- [ ] 401 on any mutation triggers session-expired event
- [ ] providers.tsx shows re-login modal on session-expired
- [ ] npx tsc --noEmit passes

**Verify:** `npx vitest run` → all pass; `npx tsc --noEmit` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/BurgerMenu.tsx", "src/lib/queryClient.ts", "src/app/providers.tsx", "src/lib/apiFetch.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Cache cleared on logout", "401 triggers session-expired event", "Re-login modal shown", "All tests pass"]}
```
